_comment: Copy to connection.json (gitignored) and fill in your values.

factoryRoot._comment: Absolute path to the factory repo root. Leave unset to use auto-detection.

github._comment: GitHub connection settings. All fields are optional for local-only use.

token._comment: Personal access token with repo scope. Set via env var — never commit the real token.

owner._comment: GitHub org or user that owns the target repo (e.g. 'my-org').

repo._comment: GitHub repo name (e.g. 'my-project'). Inferred from git remote when blank.

anthropic._comment: Anthropic API credentials. Required only when running agents.

apiKey._comment: Anthropic API key. Set via env var — never commit the real key.
